title: Reverse String
prompt:
Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters `s`.

You must do this by modifying the input array in-place with O(1) extra memory.
constraints: s[i] is a printable ascii character.

notesForAI.coreIdea: Use two pointers (left and right). Swap elements at left and right, then move left forward and right backward until they meet.
commonBugs: Creating a new array instead of modifying in-place
Off-by-one in the loop condition (should be left < right, not left <= right for odd-length strings)
